text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, Matikanefukukitaru and a<n>few others
gather in a classroom<n>around a ouija board.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Spirits abound, hear my plea! 'Tis<n>only you who
can assist me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A precious lucky item has gone<n>astray! Please
show me a sign to<n>lead the way!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Fukukitaru. Look, we're<n>also here to
help, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Resorting to a ouija board to find a<n>lost item? I
guess that's the<n>Fukukitaru we know.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose, but... she seems a lot more<n>panicky
today. Let's stick with her<n>until she's gotten it
out of her<n>system.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now then! Be fair and true!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O spirits, I declare! I beseech you—of<n>your
presence, let us be aware!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The ten-yen coin begins to slowly<n>move as if in
response to<n>Matikanefukukitaru's pleas!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eek?! It r-rolled out from underneath<n>our fingers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A spirit has descended! Woiyaaaaa!<n>Haiyaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please tell me where my precious<n>item of good
fortune lies!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The ten-yen coin begins to slide<n>again, stopping
over three letters—"P,"<n>"O," and "T."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, yes, yes, YEEEEES! The<n>spirit has
spoken!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That spells "pot"! As in "cook or put<n>away the
pot"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now we're cooking! But we'regonna have to work for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Is that how you use a ouija<n>board?
Aren't we supposed to wait<n>for it to completely
spell out the<n>answer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru seems... a lot more<n>panicked than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All shall be solved if I follow your<n>guidance, O
wise spirit! What must I<n>do?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They continue to use the ouija board,
Fukukitaru-style.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
E! As in... "endure exercise"?! Okay,<n>then! I'll do
thirty squats!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
R! "Run over to get a drink"! The<n>perfect reward
after my second set of<n>thirty squats! I'm sure
we'll find<n>some kind of hint if we do that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
T! That must mean the "tree stump"!<n>I'm sure
that will lead the way to my<n>handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAHHHHH! I can't find it<n>anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's about time we tell her that<n>she's
doing it wrong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...How about we look for your<n>handkerchief the
old-fashioned way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O spirit so great! My academy life<n>depends on
my lucky item!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've—sniff!—made such amazingfriends thanks to its blessings!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As such, it's essential to me!<n>Pleeeeease! I'm
begging you, Great<n>Spirit!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It was a lucky item to boost her<n>fortune in
friendship. Her friends feel<n>conflicted now having
learned the<n>reason for Matikanefukukitaru's
state of panic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks to that... item, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! You two look so serious! Is<n>something
wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...It's a long story, but helping you<n>find your
precious item is our priority.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Let's try searching the dorms<n>and cafeteria
again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How amazing are these friends of<n>mine! I'm
blessed beyond belief!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While Matikanefukukitaru gushes<n>about her
friends, she looks toward<n>the sky. In that
moment...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
OHHHH! THAT TREETOP! My<n>handkerchief is
stuck up there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have the glorious spirit to thank for<n>this! Many
thanks, many thanks, O<n>spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you thanking the spirit for?
"P-O-T-E-E-R-T" doesn't mean<n>anything.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But "P-O-T-E-E-R-T" backwards<n>is...
"treetop..."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No way...
